case_title: COHEN GERALD S. D.C. VS HICKS RICHARD MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COHEN GERALD S. D.C. AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS RICHARD MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
